clear_day.ai_summary: Beautiful clear skies with plenty of sunshine. Perfect weather for outdoor activities with comfortable temperatures and light winds.

partly_cloudy.ai_summary: Partly cloudy conditions with occasional sunshine breaking through. Mild temperatures with moderate winds from the west.

cloudy.ai_summary: Overcast skies dominate today with thick cloud cover. Cool temperatures and brisk winds make it feel quite chilly.

light_rain.ai_summary: Light rain showers expected throughout the day. Bring an umbrella and dress warmly as temperatures remain cool.

heavy_rain.ai_summary: Heavy rainfall with strong winds creating challenging conditions. Stay indoors if possible and avoid unnecessary travel.

thunderstorm.ai_summary: Thunderstorms with lightning and heavy rain expected. Seek shelter immediately and avoid outdoor activities until conditions improve.
